title: AIREP profile: owasp_threat v0.1
description: Tags an AIREP record with a threat identifier from an external catalogue (OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications, OWASP Agentic AI threats, MITRE ATLAS, or Google SAIF) and the control that detected or mitigated it. INDICATIVE: identifiers are a design aid to be checked against the source catalogue. AIREP records that a control fired and links it to the named threat; it does not by itself prove the threat was fully neutralised. Attaches under profiles.owasp_threat; never changes the core.

catalogue.description: The catalogue the threat_id belongs to.

threat_id.description: The identifier within the catalogue, for example 'LLM01' (prompt injection) for owasp_llm or an 'AML.Txxxx' technique id for mitre_atlas.

control.description: The gate or policy that detected or mitigated the threat (maps to a core directive.verb + policy_basis).

status.description: What happened to the threat in this decision.
